name: Spicy Green Beans (Masaledar Sem)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and cut them crosswise at 1/4 inch intervals.
2. Put the ginger and garlic into the container of an electric blender or food processor. Add 1/3 of the water and blend until fairly smooth.
3. Heat the oil in a wide, heavy saucepan over a medium flame.
4. When hot, put in the cumin seeds. Stir for five seconds.
5. Put in the crushed chili.
6. Pour in the ginger-garlic paste.
7. Stir and cook for about a minute.
8. Add the coriander. Stir a few times.
9. Put in the chopped tomatoes. Stir and cook for about 2 minutes, mashing up the tomato pieces with the back of a slotted spoon as you do so.
10. Add the beans, salt, and the remaining water. Bring to a simmer.
11. Cover, turn the heat to low and cook for about 8-10 minutes or until the beans are tender.
12. Remove the cover. Add the lemon juice, roasted cumin, and a generous amount of freshly ground pepper.
13. Turn the heat up and boil away all of the liquid, stirring gently.
